morning_thesis: JUNETEENTH NATIONAL INDEPENDENCE DAY — US equity markets closed. NYSE/Alpaca next_open: 2026-06-22T09:30:00-04:00 (Monday). No trades today. Circuit breakers re-armed with live equity. Loop states reset (first_entry_lock cleared). Carry levels (748.00, 745.33) expire 2026-06-20 — Monday premarket must draw fresh levels for Monday session.

predictions.claim: NO_TRADE_DAY — Juneteenth national holiday. Market closed.
predictions.actual: US equity markets were closed all day for Juneteenth National Independence Day. No price action. Zero heartbeat ticks.

surprises: Monthly options expiry (3rd Friday June) falls on a holiday — unclear if settled Thursday 6/18 or rolls to Monday. Confirm at Monday premarket.
Swarm from 6/18 (stale 22h by daily review) flags 752.09 as key battle level for Monday open — only actionable intelligence surviving the holiday.
lesson: Holiday reviews should pre-seed the next session's Active level candidates (RTH H/L from prior_session data) so Monday premarket doesn't open from a blank slate.
tomorrow_hint: MONDAY — full level rebuild required; watch 752.09 battle; carry levels expired; PCE on 6/25
